Title: Successful Login
Preconditions: User has an existing account with valid credentials.
Test Steps:
1. Enter the username "testuser".
2. Enter the password "testpassword".
3. Click on the login button.
Expected Result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the home page.

Title: Failed Login with Incorrect Password
Preconditions: User has an existing account with valid username but invalid password.
Test Steps:
1. Enter the username "testuser".
2. Enter the password "wrongpassword".
3. Click on the login button.
Expected Result: User receives an "Unauthorized" message and remains on the login page.

Title: Successful Registration
Preconditions: User does not have an existing account.
Test Steps:
1. Enter the email "testuser@example.com".
2. Enter the password "testpassword".
3. Click on the signup button.
Expected Result: User is successfully registered and redirected to the login page.

Title: Registration with Invalid Email Format
Preconditions: User does not have an existing account.
Test Steps:
1. Enter the email "testuserexample.com".
2. Enter the password "testpassword".
3. Click on the signup button.
Expected Result: User receives an error message indicating an invalid email format and remains on the signup page.

Title: Successful Profile Update
Preconditions: User is logged in with valid credentials.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile page.
2. Enter the new profile data "NewProfileData".
3. Click on the update profile button.
Expected Result: User's profile is successfully updated and a confirmation message is displayed.

Title: Profile Update with Empty Fields
Preconditions: User is logged in with valid credentials.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile page.
2. Leave all fields empty.
3. Click on the update profile button.
Expected Result: User receives an error message indicating required fields cannot be empty and remains on the profile page.

Title: Successful Session Termination
Preconditions: User is logged in with valid credentials.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the exit page.
2. Select the exit reason as "Logout".
3. Click on the exit button.
Expected Result: User's session is terminated and redirected to the login page.

Title: Session Termination with Invalid Reason
Preconditions: User is logged in with valid credentials.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the exit page.
2. Enter an invalid exit reason "InvalidReason".
3. Click on the exit button.
Expected Result: User receives an error message indicating an invalid exit reason and remains on the exit page.

Title: Login with Empty Fields
Preconditions: User has an existing account.
Test Steps:
1. Leave both username and password fields empty.
2. Click on the login button.
Expected Result: User receives an error message indicating required fields cannot be empty and remains on the login page.

Title: Registration with Existing Email
Preconditions: User already has an account with the same email.
Test Steps:
1. Enter the email "testuser@example.com".
2. Enter the password "testpassword".
3. Click on the signup button.
Expected Result: User receives an error message indicating the email is already registered and remains on the signup page.

Title: Profile Update with Special Characters
Preconditions: User is logged in with valid credentials.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile page.
2. Enter special characters "@!#$%^&*()" in the profile data field.
3. Click on the update profile button.
Expected Result: User's profile is successfully updated with the special characters and a confirmation message is displayed.

Title: Session Termination with No Reason Provided
Preconditions: User is logged in with valid credentials.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the exit page.
2. Leave the exit reason field empty.
3. Click on the exit button.
Expected Result: User receives an error message indicating a reason is required and remains on the exit page.

Title: Login with Nonexistent Account
Preconditions: User does not have an account.
Test Steps:
1. Enter the username "nonexistentuser".
2. Enter the password "testpassword".
3. Click on the login button.
Expected Result: User receives an "Unauthorized" message and remains on the login page.

Title: Registration with Weak Password
Preconditions: User does not have an existing account.
Test Steps:
1. Enter the email "weakuser@example.com".
2. Enter the password "123456".
3. Click on the signup button.
Expected Result: User receives an error message indicating a strong password is required and remains on the signup page.

Title: Profile Update with Long Text
Preconditions: User is logged in with valid credentials.
Test Data:
- Username: testuser
- ProfileData: A very long text string exceeding the maximum allowed length.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile page.
2. Enter a very long text string in the profile data field.
3. Click on the update profile button.
Expected Result: User receives an error message indicating the text exceeds the maximum allowed length and remains on the profile page.

Title: Session Termination with Valid Reason
Preconditions: User is logged in with valid credentials.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the exit page.
2. Select the exit reason as "Logout".
3. Click on the exit button.
Expected Result: User's session is terminated and redirected to the login page.

Title: Login with Special Characters in Username
Preconditions: User has an existing account with a username containing special characters.
Test Steps:
1. Enter the username "@!#$%^&*()".
2. Enter the password "testpassword".
3. Click on the login button.
Expected Result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the home page.

Title: Registration with Short Email
Preconditions: User does not have an existing account.
Test Steps:
1. Enter the email "t@example.com".
2. Enter the password "testpassword".
3. Click on the signup button.
Expected Result: User receives an error message indicating the email is too short and remains on the signup page.

Title: Profile Update with Numeric Only Data
Preconditions: User is logged in with valid credentials.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile page.
2. Enter numeric data "1234567890" in the profile data field.
3. Click on the update profile button.
Expected Result: User's profile is successfully updated with the numeric data and a confirmation message is displayed.

Title: Session Termination with Valid Reason and Additional Comment
Preconditions: User is logged in with valid credentials.
Test Data:
- ExitReason: Logout
- Comment: Leaving for now
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the exit page.
2. Select the exit reason as "Logout".
3. Enter a comment "Leaving for now".
4. Click on the exit button.
Expected Result: User's session is terminated and redirected to the login page.

Title: Login with Case Sensitive Username
Preconditions: User has an existing account with a case-sensitive username.
Test Steps:
1. Enter the username "TestUser".
2. Enter the password "testpassword".
3. Click on the login button.
Expected Result: User receives an "Unauthorized" message and remains on the login page.

Title: Registration with Long Email
Preconditions: User does not have an existing account.
